case_title: HANSON PING CHI WAN VS. JOEL SUDARIA DELROSARIO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-14-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-25-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-05-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
